message:
test(abi): expand pthread condvar core tests and add thread lifecycle test coverage

Expand pthread condition variable core tests with enhanced coverage scenarios and introduce comprehensive thread lifecycle testing. These additions strengthen ABI validation for core pthread synchronization primitives and thread creation/destruction sequences.

Changes:
- Expanded pthread_cond_core_test.rs with 72 lines of additional test cases for condvar operations
- Added pthread_thread_lifecycle_test.rs with 77 lines of comprehensive thread lifecycle tests
- Total: 147 insertions across both test files validating pthread runtime behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
